affected_files.reason: task-3.2.5's named impacted module: cross-process gRPC integration test exercising all 5 implemented RPCs over a real net.Listener + grpc.Server with LatencyInterceptor wired in, plus GRPCSplitProposer against the same real server for ProposeSplit's Unimplemented path.

affected_modules: engine/rpc (package rpc_test, external test package -- no production code changes)
engine/split (consumed as a black-box dependency: GRPCSplitProposer)
engine/catalog, engine/graph, engine/btree, engine/wal (consumed as real backing stores, no changes)
production_code_changes: none -- this subtask is test-only per the issue's own text ("integration test... Impacted modules: engine/rpc/integration_test.go") and the task prompt's explicit instruction to keep any wiring minimal and test-scoped. No new grpc.Server construction helper is added to non-test code because no production call site (e.g. a cmd/ main) exists yet to host one; inlining server setup in the test's own helper is sufficient and avoids speculative production API surface.
dependents: None -- this is a leaf test file. It does not change any exported API used elsewhere.
risk_notes: Test-only change; cannot regress production behavior.
Uses a real net.Listener bound to 127.0.0.1:0 (OS-assigned ephemeral port) -- no fixed-port flakiness risk.
Server and client connection lifecycles are torn down via t.Cleanup (GracefulStop + conn.Close), matching engine/split/proposer_grpc_test.go's established -race-safe pattern.

ProposeSplit is intentionally left Unimplemented server-side; test asserts codes.Unimplemented rather than a successful split plan -- this is a correctness assertion about existing (already-verified) 3.2.2/3.2.3 behavior, not new behavior.
prior_decisions_reused: task-3.2.2: Server field wiring / NewServer signature (cat, cs, idAlloc, g, btreeStore, btreeRootNodeID)
task-3.2.3: GRPCSplitProposer / NewGRPCSplitProposer(client, timeout) and its documented error-wrapping contract
engine/rpc/server_test.go's newFixture: real catalog+content+btree+graph composition pattern
engine/split/proposer_grpc_test.go's startFixtureServer: grpc.NewClient + insecure.NewCredentials + t.Cleanup teardown pattern (adapted to a real net.Listener instead of bufconn)
